repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: University Relations tape recordings and movie films

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. University Relations. Radio - Television - Film Office

did.abstract: Audio tapes of radio programs and campus events; radio production logs, 1972-1981; and movie films. Also, video tapes of campus events.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Audio tapes of radio programs and campus events; radio production logs, 1972-1981; and movie films. Also, video tapes of campus events.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: University Relations, Radio-Television-Film Office tape recordings, #4-3-875. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Restricted in part to permission of office of origin.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Due to the fragility and potential degradation of moving image and sound recordings, viewing and listening is limited to items that have been digitized. If an item is in another media format, you may request to have the item digitized for access. Information on ordering access copies may be found on the Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections webpage.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Audio visual media that has been digitized: TR-224, TR-225, TR-229
